# Sponsor YATestEnvironment

YATestEnvironment is a Clojure and Java test automation project focused on better tools for building reliable systems. It combines reflection-based code analysis, generated test data, Clojure-specific spying and mocking, Java annotation utilities, and documentation about practical testing strategy.

## Why Funding Helps

Sponsorship helps turn this project from a useful toolkit into a stronger open-source testing environment. Funding supports maintenance, documentation, examples, compatibility work, and continued development of the reflection and test-data generation pipeline.

## Current Focus

- Improve generated test-data workflows for Clojure functions and Java methods.
- Expand JSON, XML, YAML, and code-generation output from reflected class data.
- Keep Java reflection support current for records, enums, lambdas, switch expressions, annotations, constructors, fields, and methods.
- Improve the Clojure spy and mock tooling for unit-test scenarios.
- Add clearer documentation and examples for teams using automated test generation.
- Keep the project build, tests, and published artifacts healthy.

## Who Benefits

This project is useful for developers, test engineers, and maintainers who need automated test support for JVM systems, especially projects that mix Clojure and Java or need structured data from reflection metadata.

## Sponsorship Impact

GitHub Sponsors funding helps cover the time needed to:

- Maintain compatibility with current Clojure, Java, Leiningen, and dependency versions.
- Build safer generator hooks and output formats.
- Add examples that make the framework easier to adopt.
- Improve test coverage for reflection, generated data, and test helper APIs.
- Prepare releases and documentation for public use.

Thank you for supporting independent open-source testing tools.
